testsuite.name: grabflow.gateway.dns.DnsResolverTest
testsuite.system-out: 19:41:36.710 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.gateway.dns.DnsCache -- DNS cache put: cached.example.com (1 record(s)) 19:41:36.710 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.gateway.dns.DnsCache -- DNS cache hit: cached.example.com (1 live record(s)) 19:41:36.710 [Test worker] DEBUG grabflow.gateway.dns.DnsResolver -- resolve cache hit: cached.example.com A 19:41:36.715 [Test worker] WARN grabflow.gateway.dns.DnsResolver -- DNS response RCODE=3 for foo 19:41:36.715 [Test worker] WARN grabflow.gateway.dns.DnsResolver -- DNS response RCODE=2 for bar 19:41:36.715 [Test worker] WARN grabflow.gateway.dns.DnsResolver -- DNS response RCODE=1 for baz
